song_name: Hold Me Thrill Me Kiss Me Kill Me

versions.song_name: Hold Me Thrill Me Kiss Me Kill Me

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb

pro_brother.song_name: Hold Me Thrill Me Kiss Me Kill Me

content:
This song can easily be done on electric guitar,
using power chords the whole time.

[Intro]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
(octaves)[/tab]

[Main Riff]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
You don't know how you took it[/tab]
You just know what you got
Oh lawdy, you been stealing from the thieves
And you got caught
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
In the headlights of a stretch car,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
You're a star[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Dressing like your sister[/tab]
Living like a tart
If they don't know what you're doin'
Babe it must be art
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
You're a headache, in a suitcase[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
You're a star[/tab]


[Chorus]

[ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Oh no, don't be shy[/tab]
[ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
You don't have to go blind,[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
   Hold me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
   Thrill me[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
   Kiss me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch] (octaves)
   Kill me[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
You don't know how you got here[/tab]
You just know you want out
Believing in yourself almost as much as you doubt
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
You're a big smash[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
You wear it like a rash[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  Star[/tab]


[Chorus]

[ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Oh no, don't be shy[/tab]
[ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
You need a crowd to cry,[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
   Hold me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
   Thrill me[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
   Kiss me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
   Kill me[/tab]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
(octaves)[/tab]


[Main Riff]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
(octaves)[/tab]


[Verse 4]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
They want you to be Jesus[/tab]
They'll go down on one knee
But they'll want their money back
If you're alive at thirty-three
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
And you're turning tricks[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
With your crucifix[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
You're a star... ooo-ooo child[/tab]


[Chorus]

[ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Of course you're not shy[/tab]
[ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
You don't have to deny love,[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
   Hold me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
   Thrill me[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
   Kiss me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
   Killllllll meeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee[/tab]


[Outro riffs]

[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] x 4
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] x 12
